extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: I counted only the “Against our Company” and “Against the Subsidiaries” rows, excluding all “By” rows; criminal proceedings are Nil and 2 respectively, statutory/regulatory proceedings are 39 and 62, and tax proceedings are 16 and 31. For the quantified aggregate against the company and subsidiaries, I used the stated row amounts of ₹169.56 million and ₹855.37 million, totaling ₹1,024.93 million, and excluded promoter/director amounts and all matters filed by them. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated Total of ₹886.22 million as of March 31, 2024, rather than a re-sum of its components. The only customer concentration disclosure is for the CDMO business segment—ten largest CDMO clients contributed 39.31% of CDMO revenue from operations in Financial Year 2024—so no company-wide top-five or top-ten percentage is reported. The source tables use ₹ millions; ₹1,024.93 million converts to ₹102.493 crore and ₹886.22 million converts to ₹88.622 crore.
